usage: cephadm [-h] [--image IMAGE] [--docker] [--data-dir DATA_DIR]
               [--log-dir LOG_DIR] [--logrotate-dir LOGROTATE_DIR]
               [--sysctl-dir SYSCTL_DIR] [--unit-dir UNIT_DIR]
               [--verbose] [--timeout TIMEOUT] [--retry RETRY]
               [--env ENV] [--no-container-init] [--no-cgroups-split]
               
               {version,pull,inspect-image,ls,list-networks,adopt,rm-daemon,
               rm-cluster,run,shell,enter,ceph-volume,zap-osds,
               unit-install,unit-remove,install,registry-login,
               gather-facts,host-maintenance,verify-prereqs,
               prepare-host,add-repo,rm-repo,install-packages,
               bootstrap,deploy,check-host}
               ...

Ceph daemon management tool

positional arguments:
  {version,pull,inspect-image,ls,list-networks,adopt,rm-daemon,rm-cluster,run,shell,enter,ceph-volume,zap-osds,unit-install,unit-remove,install,registry-login,gather-facts,host-maintenance,verify-prereqs,prepare-host,add-repo,rm-repo,install-packages,bootstrap,deploy,check-host}
    version             Show cephadm version
    pull                Pull the default container image
    inspect-image       Inspect local container image
    ls                  List daemon instances on this host
    list-networks       List IP networks
    adopt               Adopt a daemon deployed with a different tool
    rm-daemon           Remove a daemon
    rm-cluster          Remove all daemons for a cluster
    run                 Run a Ceph daemon, in a container, in the foreground
    shell               Run an interactive shell inside a running daemon container
    enter               Run an interactive shell inside a running daemon container
    ceph-volume         Run ceph-volume inside a container
    zap-osds            Zap OSDs
    unit-install        Install the daemon systemd unit
    unit-remove         Remove the daemon systemd unit
    install             Install packages
    registry-login      Log host into authenticated registry
    gather-facts        Gather information about the host
    host-maintenance    Manage the maintenance state of a host
    verify-prereqs      Verify that the host meets prerequisites
    prepare-host        Prepare a host for cephadm use
    add-repo            Add Ceph package repository
    rm-repo             Remove Ceph package repository
    install-packages    Install Ceph packages
    bootstrap           Bootstrap a new Ceph cluster
    deploy              Deploy a daemon on the local host
    check-host          Check host configuration

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --image IMAGE         Container image to use
  --docker              Use docker instead of podman
  --data-dir DATA_DIR   Base directory for daemon data (default: /var/lib/ceph)
  --log-dir LOG_DIR     Base directory for daemon logs (default: /var/log/ceph)
  --logrotate-dir LOGROTATE_DIR
                        Location of logrotate configuration files (default: /etc/logrotate.d)
  --sysctl-dir SYSCTL_DIR
                        Location of sysctl configuration files (default: /usr/lib/sysctl.d)
  --unit-dir UNIT_DIR   Base directory for systemd units (default: /etc/systemd/system)
  --verbose, -v         Show debug-level log messages
  --timeout TIMEOUT     Timeout in seconds (default: None)
  --retry RETRY         Max number of retries (default: 15)
  --env ENV, -e ENV     Set environment variable
  --no-container-init   Do not run podman/docker with `--init`
  --no-cgroups-split    Do not run containers with --cgroups=split
